texto: In this life everybody's guilty of something and you must come to terms that you have a life worth fighting for. The sooner you put those guilty feelings to rest by admitting that ‘YES, Indeed it happened, and there’s nothing you can do to change the past, ‘the sooner you can get on with your life.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jesus Apolinaris sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “In this life everybody's guilty of something and you must come to terms that you have a life wort…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, vida, life-lessons, útil em momentos de mudanca e life-lessons.

frase_original: In this life everybody's guilty of something and you must come to terms that you have a life worth fighting for. The sooner you put those guilty feelings to rest by admitting that ‘YES, Indeed it happened, and there’s nothing you can do to change the past, ‘the sooner you can get on with your life.

texto: We all go through hard times in life. It’s a part of being human and it's the reality we all have to deal with. There are times we forget how valuable we are and our purpose for the life we have been given. We must take joy every day in celebrating our blessings, so it’s something we can carry in our hearts during our life’s journey.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jesus Apolinaris sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “We all go through hard times in life. It’s a part of being human and it's the reality we all have…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, blessings, hard-times, útil em momentos de viagem e hard-times.
